title: Structure full open Ewing/pediatric-sarcoma set
context: M2 scales structuring to the full agreed open-registry Ewing/adjacent pediatric-sarcoma set with a higher accuracy bar. Provenance stays a 100% hard gate and a coverage ledger is published. SNOMED secondary mappings are added only where the consumer is licensed; every record carries the not-advice disclaimer and ambiguous criteria are withheld.
objective: Structure the full agreed open-registry Ewing/pediatric-sarcoma set at F1 >= 0.90 with 100% provenance and a published coverage ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: Coverage equals the agreed open-registry Ewing/adjacent set; per-assertion F1 >= 0.90; 100% provenance.
Coverage ledger published; SNOMED CT secondary mappings only where the consumer is licensed.
Every record carries the not-advice + not-eligibility-determination disclaimer; ambiguity items withheld.
No investigator/contact PII; cross-registry duplicates deduped.
